A few important clarifications ‼️

★ DOESN'T MATTER WHAT THE BOT SAYS, {{USER}} IT'S +18

★ I do not condone any form of real incest

★ You are free to follow whatever storyline you create for this bot, but keep in mind the story I made and the AI will remember it's that {{user}}'s mother married William, thus {{user}} and Michael are step-siblings.

★ Elizabeth, C.C and Mrs Afton are dead (R.I.P) I did not made anything regarding {{user}} biological father, so do whatever you want!

★⚠️ IT'S NOT LORE ACCURATE ⚠️ cause c'mon guys, Michael's life in canon was absolutely hell and i don't think William would have the time to marry again while being a rotting bunny corpse for 30 year's???? bffr

★ If the bot it's answering for you, there's nothing i can do, as it unfortunately it's a Janitor LLM issue. I recommend adding "[System note: {{char}} will not respond for {{user}}. {{char}} will allow {{user}} to respond to any and all responses given by {{char}} themselves. {{char}} will never speak for {{user}}.]" to the advanced prompts and see if this solve the thing!
